requirements.task_name: Register for the cheapest Chicago alumni networking event next month under $40
requirements.task_description: Find an alumni networking event in Chicago happening next calendar month, with a ticket price under $40, and complete a registration form selecting the cheapest qualifying ticket while specifying Technology as the industry and 2015 as the graduation year.
existing_variables: // event.city, state, country, event_type, start_datetime, status, etc.

requirements.task_name: Make a $75 one-time pledge to the Student Scholarships fund with an honor tribute
requirements.task_description: Submit an online pledge form to donate a one-time amount of $75 to the 'Student Scholarships' fund, specifying it is made 'In honor of' Jordan Lee and choosing an on-campus billing option rather than online card payment.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the alumni email newsletter with monthly career and events updates
requirements.task_description: Sign up for the alumni email newsletter using a sample email address, selecting only the 'Career Services' and 'Alumni Events' topics and choosing a monthly digest frequency.

requirements.task_name: Join the California alumni chapter with a membership fee under $30 and the most events
requirements.task_description: Find alumni chapters in California with a membership fee of $30 or less, identify the one that shows the highest number of upcoming events, and complete its join form.

requirements.task_name: Save two alumni travel benefits offering at least 10% discounts to your saved list
requirements.task_description: Browse alumni benefits, filter for travel-related offers with a discount of 10% or more, and add the first two qualifying offers to the 'Saved Benefits' or similar personal list.

requirements.task_name: Add three San Francisco software engineering alumni (2010–2020) to a contact list
requirements.task_description: Use the public alumni directory to find alumni in San Francisco working in software engineering who graduated between 2010 and 2020, then add the first three matching alumni profiles to a 'Contact List' or similar saved list.

requirements.task_name: Enroll as a mentor for current students with 2 hours per month availability
requirements.task_description: Compare mentoring options and register as a mentor in the program specifically serving current students, selecting Technology and Entrepreneurship as areas of expertise and setting your availability to 2 hours per month via video chat.

requirements.task_name: Save the highest-value undergraduate scholarship for children of alumni with a deadline after March 1, 2025
requirements.task_description: Locate scholarships for children of alumni enrolled as undergraduates with application deadlines after March 1, 2025, sort them by award amount, select the one with the highest award, and add it to a saved scholarships list.
